title: VIROSA Extra Long Hot Water Bottle with Fluffy Cover – 2L Soft Plush Design with Pom Pom Tie – Warmth & Comfort for Pain Relief, Cramps & Winter Heat – Multiple Colours Available (Red)

features: EXTRA LONG DESIGN: 2L capacity hot water bottle with extended length for maximum coverage, perfect for soothing larger areas of the body
PLUSH COMFORT: Luxuriously soft fluffy cover provides cosy warmth whilst protecting skin from direct contact with the bottle
STYLISH FEATURES: Charming pom-pom tie detail adds a decorative touch whilst securing the plush cover in place
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for relieving muscle aches, warming cold beds, and providing soothing comfort during winter months
PRACTICAL SOLUTION: Large 2-litre capacity ensures long-lasting warmth, whilst the removable cover allows for easy cleaning
description: Product Description EXTRA LONG HOT WATER BOTTLE Experience revolutionary full body warmth with our unique extra long hot water bottle. Its soft fluffy cover, made from a luxurious faux fur, provides a gentle and comforting barrier for your skin. Your Cosy Companion for Warmth & Tension Relief The perfect hot water bottle for aches and pains. Its flexible design and large capacity ensure long-lasting heat, providing continuous, soothing warmth whether you're easing sore muscles or simply unwinding after a long day. Designed for Deeper Comfort Every detail of this insulated hot water bottle is engineered for a better experience. From the easy-fill wide mouth and leak-resistant cap to the high quality flexible rubber and heat-retaining, super soft washable cover, it’s designed for safer, cozier comfort. The Ultimate Hot Water Bottle for Pain Relief Enjoy total peace of mind with a secure, leak-proof design. The large capacity ensures long-lasting heat for effective pain relief, while the plush pom pom cover makes this the perfect cosy long hot water bottle for all your needs. Your Perfect Long Hot Water Bottle & Cover Every VIROSA bottle features the same premium, heat retaining materials. Choose from our curated palette to find the perfect long hot water bottle cover in a stylish faux fur, making it a truly personal comfort item or a perfect gift. The Ideal Hot Water Bottle for Back Pain & Full Body Warmth The unique design of our extra long hot water bottle offers unparalleled versatility. It’s the perfect solution for back pain, for tension relief in your shoulders, and for providing soothing full body warmth on a chilly night. Target all your aches and pains with one effective, comforting tool
